author: Dr. Abdul-Azeem ibn Badawi al-Khalafi
_source_note: Al-Wajeez fi Fiqh as-Sunnah wal-Kitab al-Aziz ('The Concise Presentation of the Fiqh of the Sunnah and the Noble Book'). Structured as major Books (categories of Fiqh) each subdivided into numbered Lessons. This canonical file uses the major Books as chapters — that is the level of granularity the AI enrichment step identifies in hadith_chapter. Chapter numbering follows the book's natural ordering. Sources: SalafiPublications.com translation (Abu Talhah Dawud Burbank), Concise Presentation English translation (Zarabozo), and ittibaa.com chapter extracts.

chapters.title: Book of Permissible and Impermissible Foods
